title: Spear!
body:
![IsoSpear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2da811d114d5dffc4a71ed7756b8986876a89c5.png)

# Introducing
This project modifies the model and texture of the trident, as well as its item icon. 
# Required:
ETF, EMF and OptiFine
# FAQ
Download my other project, which is also related to the trident! [https://modrinth.com/project/5iCRgbRR](https://modrinth.com/project/5iCRgbRR)
